name: Review Requester
description: Request a review from a customer via email 2 days after their booking completes, with an SMS reminder 5 days after the email.

args.subject: Thanks for visiting Bright Smile — mind sharing how it went?
args.body:
Hi {{firstName}},

Thanks so much for coming in to see us at Bright Smile Dental. We know the dentist isn't everyone's favourite place to be, so it genuinely means a lot that you trusted us with your smile.

If you have 30 seconds, we'd really appreciate a quick review. Honest words from real patients are how other nervous folks find us and realise dental care doesn't have to be scary:

https://g.page/r/Ca-example-business/review

And if anything about your visit didn't feel right, please just hit reply — we'd much rather hear from you directly so we can make it better.

Take care,
The Bright Smile team

Hi {{firstName}}, it's Bright Smile Dental — just a quick nudge: if your visit felt good, a 30-second review really helps other nervous patients find us. https://g.page/r/Ca-example-business/review — thank you!

args.subject: Review Requester agent sequence complete
args.body: Sent review request email + SMS reminder. Review destination: https://g.page/r/Ca-example-business/review. NOTE: reminder fired unconditionally — v1 has no review.submitted event; check the configured review URL manually to see if this customer responded.
